theme: The Impact of Music on Mood

sentences.english: How does music affect your mood?
Give specific examples from your own experience.
Music has a powerful effect on my mood and I use it deliberately throughout the day.
sentences.korean: 음악은 기분에 강력한 영향을 미치고 하루 종일 의도적으로 활용해요.

sentences.english: In the morning I listen to upbeat pop music to energize myself for the day ahead.
sentences.korean: 아침에 신나는 팝 음악을 들어 하루를 위해 기운을 내요.

sentences.english: When I study I switch to classical or lo-fi music because it helps me concentrate without being distracting.
sentences.korean: 공부할 때는 클래식이나 로파이 음악으로 바꾸는데 방해 없이 집중하는 데 도움이 되기 때문이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Impact of Music on Mood

theme: The Impact of Music on Mood

sentences.english: After a stressful day nothing relaxes me more than putting on some jazz and closing my eyes for ten minutes.
sentences.korean: 스트레스 많은 하루 후에 재즈를 틀고 10분간 눈을 감는 것보다 나를 더 편안하게 하는 건 없어요.

sentences.english: I truly believe music is one of the most accessible and effective tools for managing our emotions.
sentences.korean: 음악은 감정을 관리하는 가장 접근 가능하고 효과적인 도구 중 하나라고 진심으로 믿어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Impact of Music on Mood
